rationale: This is a Bus Jam / parking-puzzle satisfaction hook — its slow, deliberate "relax" pitch directly contradicts Paper.io 2's energetic, competitive arcade DNA, and the muted white/red palette clashes with the game's neon primaries. Mechanically there is no overlap: trail-drawing/territory capture cannot be faked into a grid-clearing puzzle without misleading-ad risk and poor IPM post-install. Only the casual broad audience loosely overlaps; recommend skipping this archetype and instead testing satisfying-territory-fill or near-miss tension hooks that stay native to the .io loop.
